mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, s.biz_number AS bizNumber, s.company_name AS companyName, s.opening_date AS openingDate, s.zonecode, s.address1, s.address2 FROM users u LEFT JOIN stores s ON u.user_seq = s.user_seq WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.user_type = 'PARTNER'
